transcript.speaker: Moderator
transcript.text: Thanks for making the time. To start, tell me about your work.

transcript.speaker: P11
transcript.text: I'm a product manager on a enterprise team.

transcript.speaker: Moderator
transcript.text: How did connecting your existing tools go?

transcript.speaker: P11
transcript.text: The integration took our engineers a few sessions to configure and sync properly.

transcript.speaker: Moderator
transcript.text: How do you share results with stakeholders?

transcript.speaker: P11
transcript.text: Every week I export the dashboard to slides and a pdf by hand to share it up.

transcript.speaker: Moderator
transcript.text: That’s really helpful — anything else before we wrap?

transcript.speaker: P11
transcript.text: No, I think that covers the main pain points.

themes.label: Integration setup costs engineering time
themes.summary: Connecting the existing data warehouse and tools takes several engineering sessions to configure and sync correctly.

themes.label: Reporting to stakeholders is manual
themes.summary: Sharing findings with stakeholders means exporting dashboards into slides and pdf by hand every week.
